translation_text: He who stands on his tiptoes does not stand firm; he who stretches his legs does not walk (easily).

chinese_text: 跨者不行，自見者不明，自是者不彰，自伐者無功，自矜者不長。
translation_text: (So), he who displays himself does not shine; he who asserts his own views is not distinguished; he who vaunts himself does not find his merit acknowledged; he who is self- conceited has no superiority allowed to him.
Such conditions, viewed from the standpoint of the Dao, are like remnants of food, or a tumour on the body, which all dislike.

chinese_text: 物或惡之，故有道者不處。
translation_text: Hence those who pursue (the course) of the Dao do not adopt and allow them.
